subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath appeared and manifested what He desired on a Day wherein the Pharaohs and their hosts were thrown into confusion and the tyrants were made to tremble [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی ظهر و اظهر ما اراد فی یوم فیه اضطربت الفراعنه و جنودهم و تزلزلت الجبابره
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @thankfulness; gratitude, @love of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
